metadata.dc:title: FileBrowser Test Library
metadata.dc:creator: Platform Team
metadata.dc:description: Sample XML document for viewer and editor testing.

book.title: The Road
book.author: Cormac McCarthy
book.summary: A father and his young son journey across a post-apocalyptic America, struggling to survive and maintain their humanity.

book.title: Dune
book.author: Frank Herbert
book.summary: Set in the far future, Dune follows young Paul Atreides as his family accepts stewardship of the desert planet Arrakis, source of the universe's most precious substance: spice melange.

book.title: To Kill a Mockingbird
book.author: Harper Lee
book.excerpt: "You never really understand a person until you consider things from his point of view... until you climb into his skin and walk around in it." — Atticus Finch
